About Samantha

Designing with softness, clarity, and intention.

I'm a Software Engineering student, Front-End Developer, and aspiring UI/UX Designer based in Michigan. I enjoy creating digital experiences that balance aesthetics with usability — from luxury brand websites to internal business platforms.
